steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what Ghisbain would most logically argue based on the passage. The key facts: bumblebees are among the few wild-bee genera with social behavior and dietary generalism — traits that increase resilience and make bumblebees atypical among wild bees.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: contradicts or overstates the passage; the passage does not say all wild bees lack resilience. ✗
  • Choice B: introduces claims not supported by the passage. ✗
  • Choice C: contradicts established facts in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — researchers should be cautious when generalizing from bumblebee studies to wild-bee declines broadly: directly follows from bumblebees’ atypical traits — because bumblebees respond to stress differently than most wild bees, their data cannot serve as a universal model. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
